# LCMA

Lithos Cognitive Memory Architecture internals ‚Äî scouts, retrieval, enrichment, stats.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.lcma` | XS | 0 | 0 |
| `lithos.lcma.edge_reinforce` | XS | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.lcma.enrich` | L | 1 | 0 |
| `lithos.lcma.entities` | M | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.lcma.migrations` | S | 1 | 1 |
| `lithos.lcma.retrieve` | L | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.lcma.scouts` | L | 0 | 11 |
| `lithos.lcma.stats` | L | 1 | 0 |
| `lithos.lcma.utils` | S | 1 | 1 |

## Public API

### `lithos.lcma.edge_reinforce`
- def `reinforce_related_edge` ‚Äî Strengthen an existing ``related_to`` edge or create one.

### `lithos.lcma.enrich`
- class `EnrichWorker` ‚Äî In-process background worker that consumes events and drains enrichment work.

### `lithos.lcma.entities`
- def `extract_entities` ‚Äî Extract entity names from note content.

### `lithos.lcma.migrations`
- class `MigrationRegistry` ‚Äî Persistent registry tracking applied schema migrations.
- def `run_migrations` ‚Äî Run all pending migrations in order.

### `lithos.lcma.retrieve`
- def `compute_temperature` ‚Äî Return the MVP 1 retrieval temperature.

### `lithos.lcma.scouts`
- def `scout_vector` ‚Äî ChromaDB semantic search via asyncio.to_thread.
- def `scout_lexical` ‚Äî Tantivy full-text search via asyncio.to_thread.
- def `scout_exact_alias` ‚Äî Resolve query via wiki-link resolution, UUID-prefix, and slug matching.
- def `scout_tags_recency` ‚Äî Tag + path_prefix filter sorted by recency. Returns [] when both are absent.
- def `scout_freshness` ‚Äî Boost notes with expires_at/is_stale, keyword-triggered.
- def `scout_provenance` ‚Äî Forward/reverse walk of derived_from_ids provenance index.
- def `scout_task_context` ‚Äî Pull notes linked to this task via findings or by authorship.
- def `scout_graph` ‚Äî Find neighbors of seed nodes in the wiki-link graph and typed edge graph.
- def `scout_coactivation` ‚Äî Find nodes frequently co-occurring with seed nodes in past retrievals.
- def `scout_source_url` ‚Äî Find notes from the same URL domain as seed notes.
- def `scout_contradictions` ‚Äî Query contradiction edges connected to seed nodes.

### `lithos.lcma.stats`
- class `StatsStore` ‚Äî Lazily-created SQLite store for LCMA retrieval statistics.

### `lithos.lcma.utils`
- class `Candidate` ‚Äî Internal working type during the PTS pipeline.
- def `merge_and_normalize` ‚Äî Merge candidates by node_id and normalise scores to ``[0, 1]``.

- Used by: [CognitiveMemory](CognitiveMemory.md)
